summary:
WEATHER ANOMALIES AND CLIMATE EVENTS: Brandon expresses his concerns regarding severe weather phenomena, describing visions of massive flooding, intense hurricanes, and unprecedented snowstorms. He attributes these extreme events to weather manipulation, comparing occurrences in China to potential future events in America.

GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS AND ECONOMIC FORECASTS: Brandon recounts his visions concerning global leaders and economic shifts. He describes Donald Trump attempting to de-escalate international conflicts while facing opposition from European leaders regarding Ukraine and Russia. Furthermore, he mentions seeing Canada experiencing a severe financial depression, prompting new trade deals, and suggests a major wealth transfer and the rise of a new crypto-based financial system stemming from a massive American budget bill.

GEOLOGICAL DISASTERS AND ASTRONOMICAL SIGHTINGS: Brandon shares visions of catastrophic natural disasters, detailing a massive fault line shifts. He describes seeing Japan and the United States splitting into two landmasses, accompanied by severe volcanic activity and tsunamis. Additionally, he references claims about a massive dark asteroid heading toward Earth.

SPIRITUAL AWAKENING AND RELIGIOUS WARNINGS: Brandon reflects on his spiritual beliefs, emphasizing the urgency for societal repentance. He expresses concern over modern religious leaders whom he feels are prioritizing wealth over genuine spiritual guidance. He also warns of a coming deception in Hollywood, where he believes celebrities will promote a false universal gospel, and interprets the passing of older religious figures as a call for a new generation to lead a spiritual movement.

TECHNOLOGY AND GENETIC MODIFICATION: Brandon outlines his visions regarding advancements in artificial intelligence and genetic engineering. He describes scientists cloning extinct animals, splicing human and animal DNA to create soulless beings, and attempting to achieve immortality through organ harvesting. He also expresses concern over large-scale scientific endeavors, such as particle colliders, explaining they might open dangerous portals, and mentions underground arks designed for global elites.
rawData: [July 07, 2025]-[Using Ai to make very dark things – hybrid humans]-[https://youtu.be/0rk_kmVkVZs]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me. Well, I have some things I want to say real quick about what we prayed about in our live stream six days ago, or whatever it was. You'll look at the timestamp. I told you all the Lord said what's happening in China is about to happen in America with weather warfare. It's going to pour down rain in an area, and there will be massive flooding in a matter of minutes, just like it was in China. And I warned you all about that. My son made a short on it trying to warn you about what's coming. And I said wind gusts with major hurricanes are coming. Super storms, as they try to gain and control storms, they will lose control. They will escalate this thing, and it will get out of control. And this is what's happening. You see massive flooding like, what is it, 16 inches? One graph said 12, one said 16 inches in 4 hours. That's a lot of rain. And that's when the Lord showed me there'll be places of snowstorms in the days ahead in the winter, that there'll be so much snow in an area people will have to dig themselves out of their houses because there's so much snow that falls in such a short amount of time. It will look like something that is biblical. Boom! Snowstorms as tall as their houses in a matter of—just like that is what I saw in the spirit, and it happened, and people were digging themselves out, and they were buried in snow in certain cities, and it never happened before. I don't know what that kind of average house is—what is that, six feet or more, so eight feet of snow if you're digging yourself out of your house. I mean, that's a lot of snow. So, another thing the Lord showed us yesterday was Donald Trump trying to create peace around the world with de-escalating wars. And I saw Canada in a great financial deficit. I saw a great depression. Mark was trying to tell everybody everything was okay, but the situation in Canada was dark concerning finances. And I saw him trying to make trade deals with Europe, trade deals with Asia, trade deals trying to save the economy of Canada. And every single sector of Canada was different. Some were worse than others. I believe the Toronto area was not as bad as what Alberta was. So we see—I was seeing things in the spirit, and the Lord was warning me there's major economic disaster coming. And I saw him making alliances with Emmanuel Macron, the prime minister of Germany, the king of England. These major alliances were being made by war. I saw the Pope involved in this, and the Lord showed me major things, major shifting, and they were trying to, because Trump was—he was on the outs in the vision. He was sitting in the Oval Office, and they were trying to devise a plan of how to support Zelensky without the United States. And they weren't able to really think of how can we do this because of the superpower being out of this. How do we keep funding and doing this without the United States of America? And I could see Trump turning his back on these men, and he was looking over his shoulder at them like, 'Are you paying attention that I'm not paying attention to you?' Like, you know, like you're ignoring somebody. He was looking over his shoulder, but he had a scowl on his face. Like he was snarky, like, 'I'm turning my back on you,' because they weren't doing what he wanted them to do. And that was to de-escalate war. He wants peace. He was saying, you know... And that's when I saw, if you go back several more videos, I saw the Berlin Wall. I saw the Berlin Wall, and I saw it was in Germany, and I saw half of Trump's face and I saw half of Ronald Reagan's face. And I heard, 'Bring down that wall, that iron curtain of communism, of things like that.' And it was like a type and shadow as Trump was operating in this presidency of a Ronald Reagan. And that's when I was seeing Cold War. I was seeing the darkness of Cuba. And the Lord said, 'Pay attention to Cuba.' He keeps bringing up Cuba over and over and over and over again. Even in this last video, I saw Cuba, and it was highlighted again, but it was completely dark. And the Lord said, 'Pay attention to Cuba. There's much darkness here.' So, we see the prophetic words are starting to be just like the Lord told us they'd be. The birthing pains are back-to-back-to-back-to-back-to-back. It's happening right in front of us. Major disasters, major warnings. And then Paul Begley made a video, Pastor Paul Begley on his channel—it's PaulBegleyProphecy.com, I believe, on YouTube—and they talked about a major asteroid. This is like a planet. And if you go back several more videos, if my son maybe can put this in there, he'll show you where it is, of where I told you all, 'I see a dark object. It looks like a planet. There's something coming. I don't know what this is. I believe it's Planet X. I believe there's something.' But it looked like a dark object, but it didn't have any light on it, but it looked like a rocky terrain is what it looked like in this vision. It was gray. It was a dark gray. But this thing was ginormous, and it was moving this direction. And I was like, 'What am I seeing?' I mean, you know, when I'm praying in the spirit, you all, and I'm seeing this stuff, I'm trying to decipher: is this an asteroid that's about to... because I keep telling you, fearful sights. I want you to remember the words 'fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees.' The heavens are going to be shaken in the days ahead. Major signs in the heavens. The Lord said five major things were about to take place: a shaking in the earth, a shaking in the economy, a shaking in politics, a shaking in the heavens, and a shaking in the church. Many people are going to start to go home. The older generals are going to start to go home. So, we just lost a major voice, a 90-year-old general just went home, Jimmy Swaggart. And the Lord said, 'These generals are going to start to go home.' And he said, 'Brandon, nobody lives forever, but you'll see a transition of the elders to the young people. And I'm raising up new voices. For the elders are getting tired, Brandon, and I'm raising up new young legs. Run. Take my gospel, for you are the closers. You are my closers. Take this gospel to this generation, this last generation. Bring it home. Bring it home.' He's warning us. 'I'm raising up... It's all hands on deck, ladies and gentlemen.' That's what the Lord was saying. But the other part was, 'You are now going to enter a phase that you're going to start to see things in the heavens. Fearful sights you will see that will bring them to their knees.' And I said, 'What does that mean?' They're going to be humbled and pray, 'for men's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming upon the earth, for the powers of the heavens shall be shaken.' So I go back to the video. Paul Begley says NASA just released this thing saying that there's a major planet-looking asteroid that's headed between Mars and Earth, and it's huge. Now, will we be able to see this October 31st of this year? It's moving that fast. October 31st of this year, it's going to come in between us, and we're going to be—I don't know if we'll see it or not. But what is it carrying behind it? Usually, there's other debris. There's other things. When a massive object is moving that big and it's coming, it carries stragglers. So, what other little things? Because if this thing is huge, like, I don't know, like 80 miles wide or bigger... Okay, that's a massive rock. Moving this direction. So, what else is coming beside it and moving along with it? Those are the things that I'm curious about because the Lord said to us we're going to start to see things, but not only would we see it, but there would be things that come into the Earth's atmosphere and hit the earth. He's warned me. I've even told you I've seen a massive rock hit by Miami. And when it happened, it flooded inland, a massive tsunami wave. It covered the islands. It was a major devastation of an event. And I thought, "Is this tribulation that I'm looking to?" because some of the visions that the Lord gives me when I'm praying, I know are in the tribulation. They're not all for right now. Some of them I'm looking into another time frame because I've been to the tribulation. The Lord took me there. He took me out of my body. I'm telling you, it lasted all night long. It was the most amazing experience probably I've ever had in my life. I mean, it was life-changing. I can tell you everything is so real to me still today. I see it like it was there 10 years ago. July the 6th of 2014, I had this visitation, which is today. Today's the 6th. As I make this video, I saw Japan being split down the middle. I saw it was so bad that it looked like this: it was glowing with red fire. I don't understand what that was about, but the fire was coming up through the crack of where it was split. It looked like magma coming up through it. And as it was being split, that lava was coming up and I could see Japan was in two pieces. And it was a pretty big, substantial crack. Now, you know, a little crack in your house, you see it in the wall. This was major. I would say probably a 10-miles-across crack or more. It was major. It looked like a major thing. That's just me speculating now. So if it comes out and it's 2 miles, so you've missed it was only two miles. I saw a crack. Same with what I've seen about America. If you divide Jerusalem, I saw a major splitting across America and it was divided into two pieces. It was no longer one solid piece of landmass. It was split and they had to build bridges. It was a major eruption, fault line shift. The same things I've seen about the earthquakes in the ocean warning you about, I saw shaking. Remember I told you in the video yesterday, I saw one of those buoys that was going up and down, up and down. And the Lord said, "This is activity underneath the surface of the ocean that's about to cause a major tsunami wave." And as I was seeing it, I was looking at Japan. And this buoy with the red light on it, the waves were lifting it way up. It was moving like a 100-foot move, you know, like moving in the water. It wasn't like barely moving up and down. I'm talking rocking up and down, and this wave was carrying this buoy up and down. Now, I don't know where this was directly, but right after in that vision, I'm seeing Japan. So, and I saw the buildings swing, skyscrapers swing, moving around. One in particular—I want to say it was a bunch of them, but I saw one in particular and it was a white-colored-looking building with a lot of glass and it was moving back and forth. If you go back whenever I saw retribution coming for the African-American people, the Lord showed me a baby. He showed me a baby that was being birthed in America on the 4th of July. And I thought, "Well, what in the world? How, what is that all about, Lord?" And I saw a baby that was—and I don't mean any disrespect to any baby that looks like this, but it wasn't as pretty. The baby had one of those little—I'll show you a picture of what it looked like. Now, that baby right there that you saw is like what the baby I saw in the vision with Israel, but it had a white banner with blue and it said "Israel" across it. But its teeth were already in and they looked kind of crooked. They looked like they were buck-looking teeth, you know, like sticking out of this baby's mouth. And it already had teeth. Now, I don't know any infants that have teeth, but this baby had teeth. And it wasn't that pretty-looking, but it had one of those little curly cues on its head, and it was Israel. It represented Israel. Now, I'm just being real. And it was kind of strange because I even told Braden after it was over, "That baby wasn't very cute-looking. It was kind of funny-looking," you know, because it had teeth already and most babies don't. But the baby that I saw over America looked like one of those little Gerber babies—the Gerber food—real chubby-looking cheeks, and it was a cute little baby snuggled up in a blue banner that said "USA". Well, I said, "Lord, what is that, that you are talking about, a new birthing of America on the 4th of July? What was that?" because the 4th of July passed. He said, "Brandon, what was signed on the 4th of July? The big beautiful bill. The big beautiful bill." That was the timeframe of the birthing of a new industrial revolution, a birthing of a new age. Do you see what happened? A major $4.5 trillion budget bill was signed into play for a wealth transfer—a new industrial revolution, a new thing with crypto. And then they say, "We're going to do this again on the—we're going to pass more bills on the 14th of July and we're going to do this." And then Ripple comes out and says, "Hey, we're going to be—we're applying for a bank. We're going to want to be a bank." All this is stemming off of this new BBB. All this is stemming off of it. "We're going to make crypto great. We're going to do all this stuff." And, "Lord, it is amazing." So, as he signed it on the 4th of July, the baby was born anew, and people are upset about it. But I'm telling you all, I saw a financial shift going clear into the fall. A major—and people going, "Well, this is..." I told you the dollar has to die. The beast system will rise. The end times are right at the door. And many people are not looking. They have their head in the sand. They have their head—they were looking down at the ground and they were so busy and so preoccupied at work, their 8-to-5 Monday through Friday, that they lost track of what was ahead of them, and it's Jesus is coming. Jesus is coming. And the Lord told me, he said, "Brandon, they don't know. They're so busy trying to pay their car payment, trying to pay their mortgage, trying to get their kids through college, that they see something on social media they get upset about, they look up for a minute, and then they go back into it." And I saw them, you know, they mouth off a little bit on social media, they type away, keyboard warriors, and then they go back into this, but they don't ever try to act out against it. They just say a couple of things, venting on Facebook or whatever, and they just go back into their little rut, and they don't realize the seriousness of the hour. They don't realize the seriousness of the hour, where we truly are in the end times. Many people don't realize. And he said, "Brandon, I'm going to shake America. I'm going to shake the nations. And there is going to be a major revival. A major shaking to awaken is coming. It's to get everybody's attention." They don't realize that the floods are coming, just like it was with Noah, as in the days of Noah. Do you know what I'm talking about? The rains are coming. Not really—this time it's going to be fire. But he said it's a type and shadow. What I'm trying to warn you is: are you on the boat? Are you on the boat? As we see the water rising. I told everybody they're in a pot and the water's rising and the temperature is rising, and people don't even realize that they're being cooked, with the thermometer and all the things that they're saying. They don't want to lose their notoriety by saying something that will shake everybody out of it. You know, "Well, that's a little controversial."
